entry.title: Re: Setup email to actually send to my e-mail address

Hi 

You have not mentioned for which process you want to setup email notification. Could you explain?

 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: SAP SD
entry.content:
Check if the material as enough stock to delivery in MMBE

Or 

The item is not relevent for delivery. Please check your item category in the order, and check whther it is relevent for delivery or not.

The order is already delivered. If the delivery is already created for the order, the system will not allow you create the delivery again. Check the order whether thwe delivery has been created for the order or not. You can check the same by going into VA02--> give the ordr number --> go to document flow. You can see whether the delivery has been created or not.

Regards
Chhabi Rajoriya

entry.title: Re: CPU Core Count details and Ramp-up possibility

entry.title: Re: Nadchodzące spotkania SAP Community – wrzesień/październik 2024
entry.content: Wysylacie jakies zaproszenia w kalendarzu na takie spotkanie czy prostu jest wiadomosc ze szczegolami?

entry.title: Database Logon issue with Microsoft OLEDB Driver 19 for SQL Server but works ok with OLEDB Driver 18
entry.content:
We have Crystal Report SAP Crystal Report Runtime engine 13.0 17 installed. 

When we install new Microsoft OLEDB Driver 19 for SQL Server, it gives logon issue but 

for OLEDB Driver 18 OLEDB Driver 18, it works ok. we would like to migrate from 18 to 19 OLEDB. 

SQL Server is - 13.0 version 

Can you please guide about it?

entry.title: Re: when any material document is created, also get poste...
entry.content:
In Standard it is not possible for movement type 311 in migo

I would to think  you can use two step storage location to storage location transfer using movement type 313 and 315.  after posting 313 movement you can put custom program to approval and then it should allow to post 315.

Here you need to talk with ABAP consultant to put your logic . If it works then fine. 

As per my knowledge I dont think other way

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI through...
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh,

I have attached the Use Cases now the display name is the addition. The expected output in all cases will be -

<ADONumber>44414</ADONumber>
<State></State>
<AssignedTo></AssignedTo>
<AdditionalComments> SBCDEFG  GHHHH (External) Updating the comment from SNOW - Test 11 </AdditionalComments>

(External) - can be kept or removed, this is not mandatory.

Can you please suggest if you are also using online groovy compiler or any other tool to write and compile your groovy?

Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Re: Talent intelligence hub - 2024 updates and behind the scenes!
entry.content:
Hello all,

Would anyone know wehn expiration for custom attributes like certifications will be supported?

Can't seem to find it on the roadmap...

Thank you!

Regards

Thomas

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Enable outbound processing using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hi Pradeep,

please note that the changedOn field is consistently set for all entities (having this field) if the promotion gets a different status. If you add a business unit for an inactive promotion, this simply "does not matter" since this promotion cannot be applied (and be completely broken / incomplete, by the way), so the addition has no effect (yet) anyway.

Therefore, you should only consume active promotions, and if a promotion becomes inactive, "do the needful" on your side. Changes to inactive promotions should not be looked at. And since adding or removing a business unit is only possible for an inactive promotion, I do not think there is the need to have this field there.

Please also note, there is the field "lastCalcRelevantChange" which is probably even more interesting for you. It records, at which point in time the corresponding promotion has undergone a "relevant change for OPPS(!)". This makes a difference if you upload a promotion from outside. Then, the changedOn date is NOT changed (since it always indicates when the original version of the promotion was changed).

Does this make sense?

Regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: S4Hana private cloud - Adobe forms
entry.content: Thanks Serhii, another question from the s4hana output management application is it possible to configure reports made in btp?

entry.title: Automatically confirm WT using layout-oriented storage control
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

is there a way in SAP EWM with layout-oriented storage control to automatically confirm the waiting WT from the K-point to the GI zone when the first WT to the K-point has been confirmed?

So two WTs should be created: one from the original storage type to the K-point and from the K-point to the GI zone. The second WT should then be automatically confirmed as soon as the first WT is confirmed.

Is this possible in the standard system?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: How does blue green deploy work for an MTA with managed approuter?
entry.content:
Hi,

please check the samples here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cf-mta-examples/tree/main/blue-green-deploy-strategy/blue-green-deploy-with-live-routes

It explains such scenarios - live parameters, live routes, skip-testing-phase.

Best Regards,

Jacek

entry.title: Re: How does blue green deploy work for an MTA with managed approuter?
entry.content:
More about live parameters: https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/modules, search in Modules for param name "live".

Best Regards,

Jacek

entry.title: CTMを使用したCloud Integrationの移送設定手順(How to Transport Cloud Integration with TMS in Japanese)
entry.content:
日本語でのCTMを用いたCloud Integrationの移送設定手順があまり公開されていなかったため、自身の経験をもとに設定手順/内容をシェアします。
困っている方の役に立てば幸いです。

■このpostについて

  • 目的：TMSを活用したCloud Integrationの移送設定手順について内容をシェアすること
  • ゴール：実際にシェアした内容を皆様に見ていただき、業務や検証で活用していただくこと
  • 前提条件：
    • SAP BTPアカウントを複数持っていること
      • 片方がトライアルアカウントでも可能です
    • BTP Cockpitを操作するスキルを持っていること
      • 基本的なUIの操作ができれば問題ありません
    • 移送元/移送先サブアカウント双方にIntegration Suiteがサブスクライブされていること

■全体の流れ（アジェンダ）

  1. Content Agent Serviceの有効化

  2. Process Integration Runtimeのサブスクライブ

  3. Transport Modeの設定

  4. Cloud Transport Managementの初期設定

  5. HTTP Destinationの作成(Content Agent Service)

  6. HTTP Destinationの作成(Cloud Integration)

  7. HTTP Destinationの作成(Transport Management Service)

  8. HTTP Destinationの作成(移送先サブアカウント)

  9. Transport Nodeの作成

  10. Transport Routeの作成

  11. 設定の確認(移送の実施)

※※以降は参考URLを見ながら設定を進めてください。間違えやすいと思った部分、ポイントの部分は本post内の本文に記載しています。※※

■設定手順-1.Content Agent Serviceの有効化（移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/enabling-content-transport-cloud-foundry-environment?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. Content Agent Serviceのサービスインスタンス作成とサブスクライブ
    1. 移送元となるサブアカウント内でContent Agent Serviceのサービスインスタンスを作成します。
    2.  上記のサービスキーを作成します。(後工程のDestination作成時に使用します。)
      • サービスキー作成時には下記URLstep8のJSONペーストは不要です。

        https://help.sap.com/docs/content-agent-service/user-guide/create-service-key

    3. Content Agent Serviceをサブスクライブします

      • Plan：free

  2. Content Agent ServiceのUI権限作成と付与

    1. Role Collectionを作成し、下表のRoleを作成したRole Collectionに追加する。
    2. 上記で作成したRole Collectionを移送に使用するユーザへ付与する。

■設定手順-2. Process Integration Runtimeのサブスクライブ（移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-service-instance-and-service-key-for-inbound-authentication?locale=en-US

  1. Process Integration Runtimeのサービスインスタンス作成

    1. 移送元のサブアカウント内でProcess Integration Runtimeインスタンスを作成する。

      • Plan：api
      • Space：Integration SuiteがサブスクライブされているSpaceを選択
      • Roles：「WorkspacePacakgesRead」 と 「WorkspacePackagesEdit」も権限を付与

    2. 上記のサービスキーを作成する。

      • Key Type：ClientID/Secret

■設定手順-3. Transport Modeの設定（設定対象：移送先/元Integration Suite）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/enabling-content-transport-cloud-foundry-environment?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. Integration SuiteのTransport Mode設定

    1. 移送元のIntegration Suiteを開く。

    2. トップ画面>Settings>Integrations>タブ：Transport を開く。

    3. 画面右下の「Edit」ボタンを押し、Transport Modeを設定する。

      • Transport Mode：Transport Management Service

  2. Integration Suite UIからTransportボタンを表示するための権限を付与

    1. ユーザに下記権限を付与する。
      Role NameRole Template

      Application Identifier

      AuthGroup_AdministratorAuthGroup_Administratorit!******
      WorkspacePackagesTransportWorkspacePackagesTransportit!******

■設定手順-4. Cloud Transport Managementの初期設定（設定対象：移送元Cloud Transport Management）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management/sap-cloud-transport-management/initial-setup

  1. 上記URL内のSet Up the Environment to Transport Content Archives directly in an Applicationに進む。

  2. EntitlementsにCloud Transport Managementを割当

  3. Cloud Transport Managementをサブスクライブ

  4. Cloud Transport Managementを使用するための権限を付与

  5. Cloud Transport Managementのサービスインスタンスとサービスキーを作成

    • Spaceの新規作成は不要。Integration Suiteと同じSpaceにインスタンス作成をする。

■設定手順-5. HTTP Destinationの作成(Content Agent Service)（設定対象：移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. Content Agent ServiceのDestinationを作成

    1.上記URL内のCreate SAP Content Agent Service Destinationに進む。

    • Token Service URLは下記のような形式にする。
      <サービスキー内のURL>/oauth/token

■設定手順-6. HTTP Destinationの作成(Cloud Integration)（設定対象：移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. Cloud IntegrationのDestinationを作成
    1. 上記URL内のCreate SAP Cloud Integration Destinationに進む。
      • URLは下記のような形式にする。
        <サービスキー内のURL>/api/1.0/transportmodule/Transport

■設定手順-7. HTTP Destinationの作成(Transport Management Service)（設定対象：移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

1.Content Agent Serviceのサービスインスタンスを作成

  1. 上記URL内のCreate Cloud Transport Management Destinationに進む。
    • Token Service Key Store Location/Token Service Key Store Passwordは設定不要
    • Additional Property（sourceSystemId.CPI）のみ要作成。後工程で作成するTransport Node(移送元)の名称を入力する。
      この時点では仮の値を入力しておき、Transport Nodeを設定後に正しい値を入れることも可能

■設定手順-8. HTTP Destinationの作成(移送先サブアカウント)（設定対象：移送元サブアカウント）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

1.移送先サブアカウントのサービスインスタンスを作成

  1. 上記URL内のCreate Transport Destinationsに進む。
    • URLは下記の形式にする。
      https://deploy-service.cf.<Cloud Foundry環境API End Pointのリージョン以降>/slprot/<Org名>/dev/slp
      ※<Cloud Foundry環境API End Pointのリージョン以降>と<Org名>は下記画像内の赤枠で隠されている内容をそのまま記載可能。
      　ただし、OrgNameにスペースが入っている場合は"%20"でエスケープさせることが必要です。

    •  User：S-User ID

    • Password：上記のログインパスワード

■設定手順-9. Transport Nodeの作成（設定対象：移送元Cloud Transport Management）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. 移送元のTransport Nodeを作成

    1. 上記URL内のCreate Transport Nodesに進む。

      • Name：7.のAdditional Propertyに設定した値と同じ名称

      • Content-Type：空白

      • Destination：空白

  2. 移送先のTransport Nodeを作成

    1. 上記と同様のURLに沿って進める。

      • Content-Type：Multi-Target App

      • Destination：8.で作成したDestinationを選択

■設定手順-10. Transport Nodeの作成（設定対象：移送元Cloud Transport Management）

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/creating-http-destinations-and-transport-route-cloud-foundry?locale=en-US&q=transport

  1. 9.で作成したTransport NodeをつなぐTransport Routeを作成

    1. 上記URL内のCreate Transport Routesに進む。

→ここまでの手順でTMSや移送に使用するDestinationなどは設定が完了しています。
　この後からはそれらが設定されているか、実際に移送を試して確認していきます。

■設定確認手順-11. 設定の確認(移送の実施)

参考URL：https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/content-transport-using-cloud-transport-management?locale=en-US

  1. 移送で使用するユーザに下記権限を付与
    • WorkspacePackagesTransport
  2. 移送元のIntegration Suite>Design>Integration and APIs>任意のパッケージ を開く
    1. 画面右上のTransportボタンを押下する。
    2. 移送のコメントを記載する。 
    3. Transportボタンを押下する。
    4. 移送管理No.が割り当てられたことを確認し、OKボタンを押下する。
  3. Cloud Transport Management>Transport Nodes を開く
    1. 移送先に設定されているTransport Nodeを選択する。
    2. 上記2-4. で表示されたNo.を探し、Importボタンを押下する。
    3. Statusが”Succeeded”になったことを確認する。

以上で設定と設定確認手順は終了です。
何かコメントがありましたら、お待ちしております。

entry.title: Re: List of Service Order
entry.content:
Hi 

As we know we can not get  your expected requirement from Manage Service Order App. But we can see to see item details 

The facets/tabs at the item level provide the user with specific information related to certain aspects of the item, such as price details or the transaction history of the item.

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Trouble while downloading SAP HANA studio setup from SAP software downloads.
entry.content:
Hi all,

 

As per note 2375176 by using the SAP HANA version we need to find the corresponding / required SAP HANA studio version. 

 

Now, as per the HANA version only I have to download the SAP HANA Studio setup from SAP software downloads. But, suppose my version is 2.00.059.xx ( xx= 0.00 to 0.nn) . Based on different xx's HANA studio is different. Now, when I checked the content info of one setup file IMC_STUDIO2_259_14-80000323.SAR , it comprises of all the 2.00.059.xx HANA revisions . So, ultimately which SAP HANA studio version will this setup correspond to 2.3.70 or 2.3.74 or something else. This is the case with other HANA versions also.

example : For 2.00.059.14 HANA version HANA studio is 2.3.78 . For 2.00.059.09 HANA version HANA studio is 2.3.74.

 

Regards,

 

Beena

entry.title: Aggregation method for formula using CAP CDS in BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created Analytical List Page using CAPM. I have successfully added aggregation method SUM to my report shown below:

Now I am trying to add aggregation for formula (margin/quantity) :

after adding above formula, app is showing 1 as MarginUnit and not showing aggregation on group level.

I have added @Analytics.query: true on my entity and using OData V4 for my development. UI5 version is 1.112.1.

Am I missing anything or does CAP CDS support aggregation method FORMULA?

Thank you in advance.

Monika

@david_kunz2  @Willem_Pardaens

entry.title: Table for available budget for project in SAP
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We can see available budget column in t-code S_ALR_87013558 . Can anyone please let me know from which table we can fetch this data ? 

Thanking you .

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: GUI ENQUE FM removed locks when GUI is closed
entry.content:
Hello, 

As Sandra already mentioned above, the purpose and concept of Enque and Deque is for a particular session. To achieve your requirement, you might want to consider adding a column (say lock) and update it to X (true) when lock is trigger and check in your program if lock is ON then don't let any updates happen and manually clear/Unlock via Unlock trigger. 

 

Regards,

Kiran

entry.title: An error occurs while deploying the Joule capability: triggering deployment failed.
entry.content:
I followed the official documentation to create a simple 'helloworld' capability file. It compiled successfully, but the deployment failed. Previously, I successfully deployed the same capability file(see the pic2), but now it's failing again when I attempt to deploy it with a different botname. The specific execution detail is as follows:

pic1:

The error is: error: triggering deployment failed (HTTP 400 : Bad Request - File content type is invalid) (code: DEPLOY_TRIGGER_FAILED).

Additionally, I have confirmed that I am logged into my Joule tenant, and my account roles include 'das_developer,' 'das_release_admin,' and 'end_user.'

pic2:

 

Joule

entry.title: Rethinking AI’s Role in SAP: End of Bureaucracy = a Path to True Agility and Innovation
entry.content:
AI only for SAP Consultants?

In the world of SAP IT, many believe that AI will make developers and functional teams more productive by automating tasks and helping with decision-making. This, in theory, should make work faster and everyone happier. However, there's a major concern—many consultants and workers are worried that AI will take away their jobs. This fear causes resistance to AI and slows down further automation efforts.

But focusing only on how AI can help developers and functional teams might be too narrow. AI could be even more helpful if it were used to simplify the bureaucratic processes that slow down innovation in large organizations. Over the years, many SAP projects have tried to use agile methods, which focus on working quickly and adapting to changes. Unfortunately, they often fail because of outdated processes and too much bureaucracy, which make it hard to truly embrace agile.

 

So, instead of thinking about AI as just a tool to improve developer productivity, why not consider how it could reduce bureaucracy and make SAP projects more agile? In large organizations with thousands of employees, complex approval processes and heavy paperwork slow down progress. This makes it hard to move quickly or innovate.

AI to enable SAP innovation by reducing management operations 

AI could be used to simplify and automate project management tasks like resource allocation, project timelines, and risk management. It could help streamline decision-making and approval processes, allowing project managers to focus on bigger-picture strategy instead of getting bogged down in administrative work. If AI can take over these time-consuming tasks, project teams could collaborate more effectively and work faster.

In a large SAP environment, AI could remove the red tape that holds back agile workflows. This would allow companies to move towards true innovation, without the fear of job losses. In fact, AI could create new opportunities for employees to focus on strategic work, rather than repetitive tasks, thus increasing their value in the organization.

Conclusion - start with eliminating the bureaucratic barriers

In conclusion, AI’s true potential in SAP isn’t just about making developers and functional teams more productive. It’s about breaking down the bureaucratic barriers that prevent organizations from becoming agile and innovative. By applying AI to these outdated processes, companies can speed up project delivery, foster creativity, and unlock the full benefits of agile methodologies.

Want more?

Follow https://www.linkedin.com/in/michalkrawczyk/ on linked for a new episode of my webcast where I will discuss this topic in detail.

entry.title: Re: Automatically confirm WT using layout-oriented storag...

entry.title: Re: The 2H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Key Highlights
entry.content: @abarroso  -  It appears to be a browser issue, as we can see the results after selecting the category. Could you try using incognito or private mode?

entry.title: An overview how to migrate clustered SAP instances
entry.content:
SAP developed two installation methods of NetWeaver or S/4 HANA based systems in a Windows Failover cluster. The older using shared disks exists since 1998.

SDC

Shared-Disk-Cluster which contains shared disks for Quorum, SAP ASCS instance(s) and optionally the database

FSC

File-Share-Cluster which does not use shared disks in a cluster. ASCS is installed on local disk and sapmnt share is located "somewhere" else, for example on a high-available NAS storage, a cloud storage solution, a DFS based share solution, a high-available SAMBA based solution, etc.

Customers had various requests for clusters in the past, here is just a short summary:

1. Replacing of old hardware. The existing cluster runs on too old hardware and must be moved/migrated

2. Change of SDC to FSC or vice versa. Reasons: Replacement of storage solution or just finding a cheaper solution for sapmnt share

3. Migration to cloud. Existing on-premises cluster configurations must be moved to cloud environments

4. Upgrade of Windows is necessary. But how can I upgrade a Windows Server OS in a cluster? (prior to Windows Server 2016, a Windows upgrade in a Failover cluster was ... not easy)

5. SAPGLOBALHOST which hosts sapmnt share, must be changed. Reasons: Linux will join the landscape, NAS storage solution end-of-life, to expensive storage solution, current storage solution cannot deliver the performance needed, and many, many more.

6. The Windows Domain (= Active Directory) or related DNS domain names changes. A nightmare for cluster administrators ...

This blog is an overview about the available documentation and where to find it.

Important remark!
This is not a "step-by-step" documentation! It can only be some guidance for the migration of an existing cluster landscape. Test anything in advance before you break your productive SAP system! All questions regarding your specific high availability landscape, the SAP & database configuration, a possible integration of a desaster recovery solution and more complexity is a consulting topic! Additionally, many steps described in the blogs or notes are based on proper authorization on OS level, on cluster level and on Active Directory level.
If you have a hardened Windows Server OS and/or a hardened Active Directory, carefully test any steps before you break production!

 

 

1. ​Migration of a File-Share-Cluster to a Shared-Disk-Cluster

​SAP Note 3072048:   http://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/3072048 

 

2. ​Migration of a Shared-Disk-Cluster to a File-Share-Cluster

​See blog:   https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/migration-from-a-shared-disk-cluster-to-a-file-share-cluster/ba-p/13384342 

 

3. ​How to move SAPMNT share to a different SAPGLOBAL-Host?

See blog:  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-move-sapmnt-share-to-a-different-sapglobal-host/ba-p/13531581 

 

4. ​How to move a clustered SAP system into another domain?

See blog:   https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-move-a-clustered-sap-system-into-another-domain/ba-p/13527104 

 

5. ​How to rename a hostname (network name) in a SAP cluster group?

See blog:    https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-rename-a-hostname-network-name-in-a-sap-cluster-group/ba-p/13897659

entry.title: Saving Lives one Serial Number at a Time - US DSCSA update 2024
entry.content:
These days counterfeit medications are a real threat for consumers. An example is described in the Reuters article The extraordinary demand for Novo Nordisk’s Ozempic and other drugs used for weight-loss is fueling a global surge in counterfeit versions…”! 

Statistics are available on the total number of counterfeit incidents concerning pharmaceuticals worldwide from 2002 to 2023. In 2002, 196 incidents of pharmaceutical crime were reported by the Pharmaceutical Security Institute. However, the annual number of such incidents increased significantly, up to 6,900 by 2023. (Source: Statista – Health, Pharma & Medtech – Pharmaceutical Products & Markets)

As a reminder: counterfeit designer bags, watches or sneakers cause economic harm to impacted companies whose products are copied, but do no real harm to consumers. That is very different when it comes to counterfeit medication. Using counterfeit medication causes health risks, or even worse, death.

All kinds of medicine can be counterfeited: expensive lifestyle or anti-cancer medicine, antibiotics, medication for hypertension, cholesterol lowering drugs, hormones, steroids, antihistamines, and inexpensive generic versions of basic pain killers.

In response to this, governments world-wide have enacted directives that require members of the pharmaceutical supply chain to serialize their items, which enables the identification of counterfeit products through track and trace or verification.

Since 2018, the business network SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences facilitates exchange of traceability and serialization data across the supply chain, enabling each customer to connect once and only once to share data with all partners and regulatory bodies.

In 2021, I wrote about the history and the evolution of SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences as a standard offering to the Pharma Industry. This standard cloud service is built on the SAP Business Technology Platform and is offered as Software as a Service through subscription.

SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences started with serial number request and response between Market Authorization Holders (MAH) and Contract Manufacturer Organizations (CMO), and serialization event message exchange between Market Authorization Holders (MAH), Contract Manufacturer Organizations (CMO) and 3rd Party Logistics provides (3PL).

In 2019, SAP added the capability for Regulatory Reporting, starting with reporting in the European Union. Regulatory reporting for the EU Falsified Medicine Directive (FMS) was the first capability within that scope.

SAP enlarged this offering by addressing additional regulatory reporting scenarios, based on a new generic reporting interface between SAP Advanced Track and Trace for Pharma and SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences.

Today the seven largest pharmaceutical companies globally, 16 out of the top 20 pharmaceutical companies, and two of the three largest U.S. pharmaceutical wholesalers are using SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences to connect their ecosystem.

In 2019, SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences, together with SAP Advanced Track and Trace for Pharmaceutical won the Frost & Sullivan “Visionary Innovation Leadership Award”.

In August 2021, SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Science won a Golden Stevie Award in the 18th Annual International Business Awards cycle in the “Business-to-Business Products” category.

SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Science also won the Hasso Plattner Founders´ Award 2021 in the category Products & Technology.

 

The U.S. Drug Supply Chain Security Act (U.S. DSCSA) is a federal law that defines requirements that must be followed by all companies involved in the pharmaceutical supply chain to enhance tracing at the unit level of prescription drugs. This law protects patients from fake, contaminated, or stolen medication.

The law requires wholesalers to verify prescription drugs that are returned and intended for resale.

SAP added a verification repository to SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences, to authenticate pharmaceutical items returned from hospitals and pharmacies to wholesalers before the products are resold. This scenario allows wholesalers to verify the product against manufacturer data stored in the repository and is in productive use by our customers (Manufacturers and Wholesalers) for a number of years.

Since 2015, lot-level product tracing information, including transaction information (TI), transaction history, and transaction statement (TS) must be provided in paper format to a subsequent purchasing trading partner. Since November 27th, 2023, electronic-based approaches are required for all trading partners to meet enhanced drug distribution security requirements, including electronic product tracing at unit level.

In November 2023, the FDA announced it does not intend to act on the enforcement of U.S. DSCSA until November 27th, 2024. While the U.S. DSCSA law is in effect since November 27th, 2023, this created a one-year stabilization period that allowed all stakeholders additional time to refine systems and processes necessary to maintain compliance under U.S. DSCSA.

The FDA has issued an additional exemption for connected trading partners with respect to the U.S. DSCSA. “This exemption applies to any product transacted by eligible trading partners, which are trading partners who have successfully completed or made documented efforts to complete data connections with their immediate trading partners, but still face challenges exchanging data.”

SAP already delivered the necessary capabilities to fulfill U.S. DSCSA requirements as part of SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences. Through the option for regulatory collaboration, SAP provides onboarding, integration, and messaging capabilities, including self-onboarding for a high volume of business partners who can then exchange fully standardized messages in a regulatory context.

The service also provides:

  • Invitation initiation from SAP customers to business partners who are not SAP customers
  • Self-onboarding of invited business partners
  • Transmission of standardized notifications in legislation-specific formats using a generic reporting framework
  • Receiving standardized regulatory notifications from business partners
  • Trace management.
  • Exception management

The new services of SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences help our customers and their business partners become compliant and remain compliant. 

The most recent release of SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences is release 2408 available since August 24th, 2024.

Find the first post which describes the journey of SAP Information Collaboration Hub for Life Sciences from the beginning in 2017 via the following link: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-for-life-sciences-blogs/saving-lives-one-serial-number-at-a-time/ba-p/13509270

entry.title: Custom Fields
entry.content:
We have received business requirement to add New Custom Tab with Custom Fields in the Purchase Requisition. we need help to understand the process steps to add new Tab  and fields and their feasibility.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to the help document on how to create custom fields:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/3a713139e548434e8a50800e7a7c8172.html

Also note that it is not possible to add custom field in Manage Purchase Requisitions - Professional header page only custom fields at item level can be added.

It is not supported by the framework as PR does not have a header table unlike PO.

The purchase requisition is a line-item only, which is an internal document and not a full-blow purchasing document with an actual header. Currently there are no plans from SAP to introduce any PR header. Hence, there is also no option to define any custom header fields in PR either.

Thank you,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Payment format DMEE for pain.001.001.09
entry.content: Is there a solution to this question? I cant find a download for the DE_CGI_CML_CT_V9 structure based on the DMEE

entry.title: Re: CGI_XML_CT dmee V.9
entry.content: Is there no solution? I cant find a DMEE- Instruction File which I can upload to DMEE. Where can you download it?

entry.title: Re: Web dynpro
entry.content: Refer to the below mentioned answer.

entry.title: Re: SAP CTE comparing columns of same row condition is not working
entry.content: deleted

entry.title: Re: Web dynpro
entry.content:
Hi, 

Click on the 'ROOTUIELEMENTCONTAINER ' and change the Layout to RowLayout. The Ideal way would be to add a contrainer UI element with your own layout and then add the needed fields/attributes within your Container/Group UI elements. 

Regards,

Kiran

entry.title: Re: Multiple Ledgers in Public Cloud
entry.content:
①There are no plans that My customer will use IFRS yet.
In the future, they will use IFRS(Abroad expansion).
In this case, is it not necessary that My customer process 0L about closing operation?
If there is task, let me know about that.

Since customer has plans to use IFRS, it is must to activate leading and non-leading ledgers. 0L Being the leading ledger, all the posting will definitely go to this ledger so closing operation must also be performed. For tasks, you can refer to SAP Help. 

②
If they will use multiple local account standard (multiple countries), must they define such local account standard in 2L every company code?
※ At the time of introduction, they only need to activate 0L and 2L?

Since local ledger caters to country specific GAAP, yes they must define it for every country and do the configuration at company code level.  From the information provided here 0L and 2L appear sufficient but please have a look at the different scenarios recommended by SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP CTE comparing columns of same row condition is no...
entry.content:
I have found the answer with chatgpt..it was due to my columns contain NULL values

 

3. Null Values

If either column1 or column2 contains NULL values, the comparison will not return TRUE because any comparison with NULL returns NULL. To handle NULL values, use IS NULL or COALESCE:

 

 
WITH cte_name AS (
    SELECT column1, column2    FROM table_name)
SELECT *
FROM cte_nameWHERE COALESCE(column1, '') = COALESCE(column2, '');

entry.title: Account determination for non stock purchase order
entry.content:
When we following the SAP tutorial of "Creating Purchase Order of Services" in 1LE scope item for S4HANA cloud public edition, it shows that the g/l account 51600000 is derived by material group YBMM01. 

We would like to change the predefined g/l account, but we cannot find the relative account determination configuration in IMG. Please advise where can we set this account assignment?

entry.title: Re: Cant access transaction in WEBGui for HTML via SAP Bu...
entry.content:
Thanks for your help!

The Solution was to enter my CloudFoundry org in the Whitelist of the Backend System.

Using a Whitelist for Clickjacking Framing Protection | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content:
Can you please tell use why do use the onInit und AfterRendering anyway? You can just use the default model without any JavaScript Code.

To make it more simple you can just this in the xml view:

<table:Table id="table" selectionMode="Single" rows="{/ZEMPLOYEEDATASet}" enableColumnReordering="false">
    <!-- columns for customer name, address, and email -->
    <table:columns>
        <table:Column id="idColumn3" width="50%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel3" text="ID"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText3" text="{Id}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn1" width="20%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel1" text="Name"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText1" text="{Name}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn2" width="30%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel2" text="Address"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText2" text="{Address}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
        <table:Column id="idColumn4" width="50%">
            <table:label>
                <Label id="idLabel4" text="Phone Number"/>
            </table:label>
            <table:template>
                <Text id="idText4" text="{phonenumber}"/>
            </table:template>
        </table:Column>
    </table:columns>
</table:Table>

 and in the manifest json make the OData Model the default like this and remove the name "myODataModel":

"sap.ui5": {
  "models": {
   .....
      "": {
                "type": "sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataModel",
                "dataSource": "mainService",
                "settings": {
                    "defaultBindingMode": "TwoWay",
                    "defaultCountMode": "Inline"
                }
            }
    },
}

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content: Hi Mahmood, remove the leading "/" in the Manifest OData service url, i.e., "/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/" to "sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_EMPLOYEE_SRV/". Best Regards Kennys

entry.title: SetDimension filter on Level Based Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to Dynamically pass filter on a Dimension which is a level based hierarchy.
TB_a.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("[C_c].[abc]", ["[[C_c].[abc].[Level1].&[" + v_xyz + "]"]);

C_c is the Dimension
abc is the hierarchy name
v_xyz  is the dynamic value for this which i want to pass.

but this isn't working, i have tried changing levels it still doesn't work.
i have tried other ways too, it some how doesn't work
Any clues?


@N1kh1l

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
@Volker_Ruof Oh No Volker!! that's not good news at all! Having your insights and detailed blogs always give us a much better and practical understanding! I do hope you remain an integral part of SAP Time Management Forum because you gave such a substantial meaning to it! The new Blog Author will need to have giant shoes to fill in! As always thank you very much for these wonderful posts, looking forward to check and use these new Features!! 

BR,

Evangelia

entry.title: How to find the relationship of PR and SO after MRP run
entry.content:
In MRP run, the PR is created but cannot show which sales order is created from. 

The account assignment of PR is empty. So, how can we able to check the PR is created by which SO?

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hello @Max_Gander 

Kudos that we finally are going to learn about how the Seamless planning is coming to life and what it means in technical terms. 😄

I don't know, but somehow I had a different imagination, of the final result... I thought we would also achieve a really "seamless" data storage and loading.

One example: Since very often the granularity between Actuals and Plan data is different, we need to aggregate the Actuals data to the lowest common denominator in another table. In the past we did this in BW and loaded that data into the SAC Planning model (version Actuals).

Now, when we prepare this data in Datasphere, I thought we either could load it directly into the SAC Planning Table in Datasphere, without the need to load it into SAC (Planning model), which then is just another table next to the one, where the data originates from 🙈

Or we even could use a Union Fact View for the Planning & aggregated Actuals tables to expose this (just like a BW Composite Provider) to SAC for planning purposes. So the former Planning model would be a shell, reading the Actuals version from one table, and the Plan version from another. So, like in BW, you would define one table (DSO) as write-enabled.

This was how I imagined the upcoming solution. 😦

Question: If we combined the DSP SAC Plan table in a Union Fact View with another table and create an analytical model on top, how would be the version handling? Are we able to define the same column in the 2nd DSP table for the Union and work with it in a Live Story? Or will these planning tables not be consumeable via Fact View and Analytic model?

Thanks and BR,

Martin

entry.title: Re: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content:
Hi  @helge23 
for your example, you can use the following code:

DEFINE VIEW Z_Material_VIEW AS SELECT FROM Your_Source
{
    Material,
    MAX(Column1) AS Column1,
    MAX(Column2) AS Column2,
    MAX(Column3) AS Column3
}
GROUP BY Material;

This code will take the Material field, group the rows, and return the maximum non-null value for each column (Column1, Column2, Column3).

BR,
Oleg

entry.title: Re: Repository Job from script
entry.content:
Hi Ravi,

every repository job as its own ID. You can get the ID of the job for the repository at runtime and execute it.

In the following help page you find the necessary steps: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_IDENTITY_MANAGEMENT/4773a9ae1296411a9d5c24873a8d418c/be34676e419149419919b80729fd2ffa.html?locale=en-US&q=uRunJobNow

Note: Do not hard code the ID, it changes with every transport.

Regards

 Norman

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Enable outbound processing using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Andreas,

I have tested your suggestions and it worked!

Many Thanks for your prompt response.

 

Regards,

Pradeep

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi all,

My name is Bang. I'm learning about SAP BTP which is new knowledges to me. What's a wonderful forum to share knowledges to everyone. Thanks David and SAP support Team!

entry.title: WESOUT Badi ‘WES_SE_MERCHANDISE_OUTBOUND’ does not support individual error handling, what next?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m encountering an issue with WESOUT and need some assistance. Here’s the situation:

  1. Custom Field Mapping: We use the Badi ‘WES_SE_MERCHANDISE_OUTBOUND’ to map custom fields.
  2. Error Logging Requirement: I need to log an error if a material lacks a certain value.

The Problem:

  • When processing a small number of materials, WESOUT calls the Badi for each material individually.
  • However, when processing a large number of materials, WESOUT calls the Badi once for all materials.
  • This causes a logic issue: if I raise an error for one incorrect material, it results in an error for all materials.

Objective:

  • I want to keep both the custom field mapping and error logging in the same place.
  • Duplicating the custom code in multiple places is not ideal.

Challenge:

  • There is an object for logging just outside the Badi call, but it is not available within the Badi.

Request:

  • Does anyone have any suggestions on how to maintain the custom mapping logic and add individual error logging within the Badi?

Any ideas or insights would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advance...
entry.content: Thank you for your reply. Sadly I can't restrict the scope setting this way because there are a lot of possibile combinations. Each Product can be in different flow per account. I also though that VARIABLEMEMBER and FOREACH would have been useful for the goal (as in the script sample of my last attempt), but no. Anyway, Above I have reported only an example of combination (which I just extended with more entries), but the requirements is to "iterate" every combination for flow !=# and valorize the above mentioned measures with the ones in flow = # (this should be done for each member and combination).

entry.title: Re: Fiori : Navigate from List to Detail Alternative
entry.content:
There is even a sample in the docs: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/a12ad6058db84e8cb60a3a9b2ade63fb

Basically you remove the standard navigation and replace it with something of your own like add a button or use the standard button to navigate

entry.title: Automation timeout issue in Virtual Machine
entry.content:
Good morning,

I am writing on this channel because I will need your help. I have many automations job executed from Virtual Machine, when we run the automation Jobs with a window open to check that everything is running correctly, the job is completed without errors. But when we don't have a window open on the virtual machine, the automation job fail.

The automations that are causing me problems interact directly in Sap S4 Hana Cloud Public. And I notice that when I don't have a window open on the VM, the display of the S4 site is slower than when I have a window open on the VM. 

I see that the automation passes the first authentication steps, but fails every time on the S4 Home Page and must click on the "Manage Fixed Assets" application. I found that by increasing the timeout to 10min on the "click - Manage Fixed Assets" step, the automation runs correctly. 

This is an unacceptable workaround because this automation must create more than 400 Fixed Assets. An operation that takes 1min with a window open on the VM, and 10min with no window open on the VM.

Has anyone encountered the same kind of problem ?
Regards,

entry.title: Re: Enter does not work when I deploy my RAP app in Fiori Launchpad
entry.content: Can you explain more in what context. I guess from your List Report? Where is your cursor when you press enter? In a Filter Field or does it update when you just press enter in general?

entry.title: DMC upload file Simulation error in Product object
entry.content:
Hi All, I have an issue while loading data for Product in DMC. Even though I am entering the value in field "Price Control" but still I am getting a simulation error :

Short Text

Specify a price control

Diagnosis

Owing to the material type, value-based inventory management is defined for this material. You are therefore required to enter a price control indicator.

 

Procedure

Specify the price control indicator.

 

 

Can someone help here on what is going wrong?

entry.title: Batch Determination/SO stock transfer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to do stock transfer between SO stocks.

Transfer from:

Plant-1000/SLo-AA (batch were numbered based on GR date)

SO1/Batch 1001/stock 5pcs

SO2/Batch 1002/stock 10pcs

SO2/Batch 1003/stock 35pcs

Transfer to:

Plant-1000/SLo-AA

SO4/ Needed qty 17pcs

Is it possible to make this operation by using batch determination?

Target:

Indicate SO4 and 17pcs then system automatically assign Batch 1001-5pcs,Batch 1002-10pcs, Batch 1003-2pcs

Appreciate you help!

Regards

Shin

entry.title: Re: Account determination for non stock purchase order
entry.content:
Hi 

We have account determination in  use SSCUI 100297  and select sourcing and procurement 

Regards

Rashid Khan

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Release Date - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public

entry.title: Re: 000010 : Enter cancellation proced. Message No. VU001
entry.content: Issue is resolved now.

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content: Hi @Kennys, I removed it but it is the same error "[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed"

entry.title: Re: 000010 : Enter cancellation proced. Message No. VU001
entry.content:
Issue is resolved now.

Solution : I forgot to maintain Contract Profile in VOV8 that's why I'm getting this type of warning messages.

entry.title: Re: Edit output email address in RFQ

entry.title: Re: I can not access the OData service from BAS.
entry.content: Hi Marian, thanks for your answer. I have updated the manifest and view files as you said but I still get this message "[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed."

entry.title: Re: CDS : How to define Hierarchy View
entry.content:
In this blog, sample query ZLR_CONN_QUERY is based on Dimension ZLR_CONN.

In dimension ZLR_CONN, we define association to Hierarchy view - ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as

 

association [0..*] to ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as _hier on $projection.carrid = _hier.carrid

and $projection.connid = _hier.connid

and also use following annotation for the field connid.

 

@ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_hier'

key connid,

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'using new way of Hierarchy'
@Analytics : { dataCategory: #DIMENSION, dataExtraction.enabled: true }
@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'connid'
define view entity ZLR_CONN as select from zoq_spfli

  association [0..*] to ZLR_CONN_HIERARCHY as _hier             on  $projection.carrid = _hier.carrid
                                                                      and $projection.connid = _hier.connid

  association [1]    to ZOQ_AIRLINE              as _airline          on  $projection.carrid = _airline.carrid

  association [1]    to ZOQ_CITY_FROM            as _cityfrom         on  $projection.countryfrom = _cityfrom.country
                                                                      and $projection.cityfrom    = _cityfrom.city

  association [1]    to ZOQ_CITY_TO              as _cityto           on  $projection.countryto = _cityto.country
                                                                      and $projection.cityto    = _cityto.city

  association [0..*] to ZOQ_COUNTRY_TEXT         as _text_countryfrom on  $projection.countryfrom = _text_countryfrom.country

  association [0..*] to ZOQ_COUNTRY_TEXT         as _text_countryto   on  $projection.countryto = _text_countryto.country

  association [1] to ZOQ_AIRPORT              as _airportfrom      on  $projection.airportfrom = _airportfrom.AirportID

  association [1] to ZOQ_AIRPORT_TEXT         as _text_airportto   on  $projection.airportto = _text_airportto.id

{
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_airline'
  key carrid,
      @ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_hier'
  key connid,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_countryfrom'
      countryfr                                as countryfrom,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_cityfrom'
      cityfrom,  
//      @analytics.hidden: false
//      @Semantics.spatialData.srid.value : '3857'
//      @Semantics.spatialData.type : [#POINT]      
//      _cityfrom.geopoint                       as geoCoordinates,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_airportfrom'
      airpfrom                                 as airportfrom,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_countryto'
      countryto,
      @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_cityto'
      cityto,
      @ObjectModel.text.association: '_text_airportto'
      airpto                                   as airportto, 
      fltime                                   as flighttime,
      deptime,
      arrtime,
   //   @Semantics.unitOfMeasure: true - Not relevent for view entities
      distid,      
      @DefaultAggregation: #MAX
      @Semantics.quantity.unitOfMeasure : 'distid'
      distance,
      fltype,
      period,

      @Semantics.systemDate.createdAt
  @Consumption.filter: 
  {
    selectionType: #RANGE,
    multipleSelections: true,
    mandatory: false
  }
      //      cast (concat( '20160322' , deptime ) as rstimestmp ) as createdAt,
      cast ( '20160322235959' as rstimestmp )  as createdAt,

      _airline,
      _cityfrom,
      _cityto,
      _text_countryfrom,
      _text_countryto,
      _airportfrom,
      _text_airportto,
      _hier

}

 

 and query is based on this dimension.

entry.title: Re: Pop up when using Post goods receipt for Purchasing document

You can register to receive further information about the course:

Putting AI Ethics into Practice at SAP

entry.title: Learning History View (LRN-161237)
entry.content:
Dear all,

Regarding LRN-161237 in 2H 2024 release, the Credit Hours, Type and Ratings columns will be removed from the Learning History View. Is there any option that allows admins to retain this information?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Publication from optimized design mode not possible w...
entry.content: Hi William, thanks that's a positive outlook! Do you know if the timeline is already planned and in which quarterly update the feature will be available? I hope it will be available before depreciation of classic design mode?

entry.title: Re: How to prevent users from submitting data within the...
entry.content: Hi @T_Eva thanks a lot for your comment, it works

entry.title: Re: Sales order item gets "Fully delivered" status even if partial qty
entry.content:
Hi,
I faced the similar issue. Issue is in the Item Category.
Go to VOV7, remove the Item Type if it is set to either 'A' or 'B'.

entry.title: Can Compensation reference salary from Payroll rather than EC?
entry.content:
The Powers That Be have decided to redesign the entire bonus process.  They now want to pay quarterly bonuses, based on EARNED salary for the previous months and the company performance.  This means that the Compensation module needs to reference payroll run results rather than the EC reward data.  We have no idea whether this is possible, and I can’t find an answer from Mr Google.

We do have payroll run results imported into EC, but no idea whether Compensation is flexible enough to use "other" data.

Any guidance gratefully received!

Emily

entry.content: that should work

entry.title: Re: Add custom field in the BP customer relationships (contact person)
entry.content: Hi I have similar query. May I know if there is any tab called contact person in Customer master data(Not the BP contact person we create)? If yes then how to activate it?

entry.title: Re: Automatically confirm WT using layout-oriented storag...
entry.content:
Hello @mrbeam 

Alternatively to @Mrak1 proposal you could uncheck "confirm removal" in K point storage type configuration and "confirm putaway" in GI storage type. That would also make WT confirm automatically.

Best regards

Dominik

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action - Calculating Allocation % is not sum...
entry.content:
@zee_siddique 

Because you Kg's produced data is already with 7 decimals, when you calculate the Allocation weight, it will require more than 7 decimal precision to get an exact sum of 1. In Excel its summing to 100% or 1 because you have more than 7 decimal precision there. Now SAC has 7 decimal precision for their measure so there is no way we can increase it. May be try to calculate the Residual amount which is not allocated and that will be 0.0000002 * Allocation Amount. You can re allocate this amount on existing weight and see if that helps. I tried it on excel and it seems to be working.

Basically I am re allocating the residual Allocation amount (0.0000002 * 1666.666667 =0.0003333) using the same weight and then adding the original Allocated amount to the residual amount. I intentionally took the amount with decimals to see if it creates precision issue.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @awais7764 - I would recommend that you join the Beginner Corner and you will see a post there from @David_Chaviano where application texts can be submitted until Nov 4, 2024.
Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I hope this helps and hope you enjoy your time in SAP Community!

entry.title: Purge External Users in 360 Reviews
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to ask for your help in the following topic: we found that there are a lot of external users created due to the 360 Reviews (adding external participants). We would like to schedule a purge to delete their data (first name, last name and email) but not the answers provided.

I found some documentation mentioning that a "DRTM 360 Reviews - External User Purge" could be created for this purpose (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PERFORMANCE_AND_GOALS/f93a40604d3f4d36a5c45560e3e483d9/5b0ce020e9a3433cb14e1cabab0f5fc0.html?locale=en-US).

However, I saw two more KBA's (https://me.sap.com/notes/3072912/E and https://me.sap.com/notes/3128427/E) using different types of purge: "Purge Inactive User" and "DRTM Master Data Purge" regarding the purge of external 360 users. But these last two, I don't think it's possible to make them recurrent.

Could you please share your insights, what should be the best approach according to your knowledge and experience?

Many thanks in advance,
Kind Regards,
Sofi

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Creating and Managing Campaigns in IAG - Access Certification Service
entry.content: @Frank_Meyer   The release option sends back the review to the pool of reviewers.

entry.title: Re: Role design strategy for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Dhanshree

Can we have test user ID's created similar to that of on-premise system for unit testing ?According to my understanding we need to have the users created in IAS to have them accessed in S4 Public system.

Is there any other way to have multiple test users created for testing purpose without having so many users created with Email ID's in IAS?

Thanks

Ganesh

entry.title: Re: General Display Name Opt out in Second Half of 2024
entry.content:
Hi @ArjenVHooydonk ,

It is not supported to configure name format for general display name on employee level as formal name. But you can configure formal name in name format for general display name. Then formal name is used for general display name. 

Thanks

Harvey
